nodes.label: httpx - Unified HTTP Framework Adapter Layer
nodes.norm_label: httpx - unified http framework adapter layer

links.source_location: Architecture section shows adapter pattern for multi-framework support
App type delegates to router methods
App.Run() provides graceful shutdown by default
Router.GROUP() enables sub-path routing for API versioning
Adapter pattern enables multi-framework support via unified interface
Wire binds Server to concrete adapter implementation
Implementation plan defines Server interface first
Middleware organized as Global (wire-injected) and Service (runtime-configured)
ServiceMiddleware is runtime configured per service
Design rationale for config-driven adapter selection
Config specifies adapter name used by factory
LoadConfig uses viper to unmarshal YAML to Config
Implementation plan creates Config type with viper
All adapters must implement GracefulServer for graceful shutdown
Implementation plan implements graceful shutdown for all adapters
Design rationale for multi-framework support via adapter pattern
Design rationale for using wire for DI
Implementation plan includes unit, E2E, and stress tests
